title: Bespoke Full-Stack Developer Portfolio
prompt: Build and style a comprehensive developer portfolio that showcases technical projects through interactive code snippets, live demo integrations, and embedded GitHub repository cards. Feature a terminal-inspired hero section with realistic typing animations and blinking cursor effects, followed by a filterable project grid organized by technology stack with hover-reveal descriptions. Include an animated skills visualization using radar charts or progress bars, a technical blog section with syntax-highlighted code blocks and copy-to-clipboard functionality, and a validated contact form with success feedback states. The design should evoke professional developer tooling through monospaced typography accents while maintaining accessibility standards for non-technical visitors including recruiters and hiring managers. The layout uses a floating navigation pattern with bold modern sensibilities and sage and lavender highlights that guide visitors through content naturally.
negative_prompt: avoid generic templates, cluttered layouts, missing dark mode, broken code syntax highlighting, non-responsive design, slow animations
acceptance_criteria: Interactive project cards with live demo links and GitHub integration
Blog section with markdown rendering and syntax highlighting
Terminal-style or code-inspired hero section with typing animation
Skills visualization with animated progress bars or radar charts
Responsive design optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop viewing
Dark mode toggle with smooth theme transitions

Include a startup journey timeline from initial idea and validation through product market fit to scaling and expansion with inflection point markers, quarterly investor update excerpts with key milestones, and open positions with role descriptions and application forms. The design should inspire confidence in both investors evaluating the founder and talented candidates considering joining the mission. Style the site with neumorphism language, emerald and cream accents, and implement carousel transitions. Layout pattern: split-screen optimized for user journey and content readability.
negative_prompt: avoid generic bios, missing metrics, no clear value proposition, excessive self-promotion, cluttered social proof, broken timeline
acceptance_criteria: Startup timeline with company milestones and funding stages
Media mentions section with publication logos
Metrics dashboard showing key business achievements
Thought leadership blog with featured articles
Speaking engagements calendar with event details
Newsletter signup with subscriber count display

Organize photographic work in a horizontal scroll gallery with smooth momentum-based scrolling intelligent lazy loading and seamless transitions between images. Include a pared-down about section with a brief compelling artistic statement and one professional portrait, a contact form that elegantly floats over the current image without disrupting the viewing experience. The typography should be understated almost invisible serving the photographs rather than competing with them and every transition should feel effortless immediate and respectful of the imagery. Create a sophisticated elegant experience on a accordion sections canvas with teal and peach as the accent palette.

acceptance_criteria: Professional typography hierarchy and readable content
